description_long: This rifle features a robust, metallic body with a matte black finish and a prominent, elongated barrel equipped with a muzzle brake at the tip. The stock and foregrip are constructed from a dark, wood-like material, providing ergonomic support for the user. The receiver is detailed with mechanical components, including a visible bolt and ejection port, and a trigger guard is integrated into the lower assembly. Iron sights are mounted along the top rail, offering basic aiming capability. The magazine appears to be internal, seamlessly integrated into the lower receiver without protruding. The overall design is utilitarian, suggesting durability and reliability for urban environments.
description: A matte black rifle with a long barrel, wood-textured stock and foregrip, iron sights, and an integrated magazine. The design is robust and functional, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wood-textured stock, foregrip, and the detailed receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel alignment, and the iron sight profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the stock, foregrip, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's end and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
